---
title: "Species index — A–Z (by scientific name)"
toc: true
---


<!-- This file is generated by scripts/generate_tree_list.py. Do not edit this file directly; update the generator or the underlying data sources instead. -->

[View A–Z by common name](/trees/genus/index.html)

# Species index (A–Z by scientific name)

## A

- [*Acer campestre* Field Maple](/trees/species/field-maple.html) — Genus: [Acer](/trees/genus/acer.html) — Family: [Sapindaceae](/trees/family/sapindaceae.html)
- [*Acer pseudoplatanus* Sycamore Maple](/trees/species/sycamore-maple.html) — Genus: [Acer](/trees/genus/acer.html) — Family: [Sapindaceae](/trees/family/sapindaceae.html)
- [*Alnus glutinosa* Black Alder](/trees/species/black-alder.html) — Genus: [Alnus](/trees/genus/alnus.html) — Family: [Betulaceae](/trees/family/betulaceae.html)
- [*Alnus incana* Grey Alder](/trees/species/grey-alder.html) — Genus: [Alnus](/trees/genus/alnus.html) — Family: [Betulaceae](/trees/family/betulaceae.html)

## B

- [*Betula pendula* Silver Birch](/trees/species/silver-birch.html) — Genus: [Betula](/trees/genus/betula.html) — Family: [Betulaceae](/trees/family/betulaceae.html)
- [*Betula pubescens* Downy Birch](/trees/species/downy-birch.html) — Genus: [Betula](/trees/genus/betula.html) — Family: [Betulaceae](/trees/family/betulaceae.html)

## C

- [*Carpinus betulus* Hornbeam](/trees/species/hornbeam.html) — Genus: [Carpinus](/trees/genus/carpinus.html) — Family: [Betulaceae](/trees/family/betulaceae.html)
- [*Castanea sativa* Sweet Chestnut](/trees/species/sweet-chestnut.html) — Genus: [Castanea](/trees/genus/castanea.html) — Family: [Fagaceae](/trees/family/fagaceae.html)
- [*Corylus avellana* Hazel](/trees/species/hazel.html) — Genus: [Corylus](/trees/genus/corylus.html) — Family: [Betulaceae](/trees/family/betulaceae.html)
- [*Crataegus monogyna* Common Hawthorn](/trees/species/common-hawthorn.html) — Genus: [Crataegus](/trees/genus/crataegus.html) — Family: [Rosaceae](/trees/family/rosaceae.html)
- [*Cydonia oblonga* Quince](/trees/species/quince.html) — Genus: [Cydonia](/trees/genus/cydonia.html) — Family: [Rosaceae](/trees/family/rosaceae.html)

## D

- [*Dicksonia antarctica* Soft Tree Fern](/trees/species/soft-tree-fern.html) — Genus: [Dicksonia](/trees/genus/dicksonia.html) — Family: [Dicksoniaceae](/trees/family/dicksoniaceae.html)
- [*Diospyros kaki* Persimmon](/trees/species/persimmon.html) — Genus: [Diospyros](/trees/genus/diospyros.html) — Family: [Ebenaceae](/trees/family/ebenaceae.html)

## E

- [*Euonymus europaeus* Spindle](/trees/species/spindle.html) — Genus: [Euonymus](/trees/genus/euonymus.html) — Family: [Celastraceae](/trees/family/celastraceae.html)

## F

- [*Fagus sylvatica* Beech](/trees/species/beech.html) — Genus: [Fagus](/trees/genus/fagus.html) — Family: [Fagaceae](/trees/family/fagaceae.html)
- [*Ficus carica* Fig](/trees/species/fig.html) — Genus: [Ficus](/trees/genus/ficus.html) — Family: [Moraceae](/trees/family/moraceae.html)
- [*Fraxinus excelsior* Ash](/trees/species/ash.html) — Genus: [Fraxinus](/trees/genus/fraxinus.html) — Family: [Oleaceae](/trees/family/oleaceae.html)

## J

- [*Juglans regia* English Walnut](/trees/species/english-walnut.html) — Genus: [Juglans](/trees/genus/juglans.html) — Family: [Juglandaceae](/trees/family/juglandaceae.html)

## M

- [*Malus* Apple Evereste](/trees/species/apple-evereste.html) — Genus: [Malus](/trees/genus/malus.html) — Family: [Rosaceae](/trees/family/rosaceae.html)
- [*Malus sylvestris* Crab Apple](/trees/species/crab-apple.html) — Genus: [Malus](/trees/genus/malus.html) — Family: [Rosaceae](/trees/family/rosaceae.html)
- [*Morus alba* Fruitless Mulberry](/trees/species/fruitless-mulberry.html) — Genus: [Morus](/trees/genus/morus.html) — Family: [Moraceae](/trees/family/moraceae.html)

## O

- [*Olea europaea* Olive](/trees/species/olive.html) — Genus: [Olea](/trees/genus/olea.html) — Family: [Oleaceae](/trees/family/oleaceae.html)

## P

- [*Pinus nigra* Black Pine](/trees/species/black-pine.html) — Genus: [Pinus](/trees/genus/pinus.html) — Family: [Pinaceae](/trees/family/pinaceae.html)
- [*Pinus pinea* Stone Pine](/trees/species/stone-pine.html) — Genus: [Pinus](/trees/genus/pinus.html) — Family: [Pinaceae](/trees/family/pinaceae.html)
- [*Platanus × hispanica* London Plane](/trees/species/london-plane.html) — Genus: [Platanus](/trees/genus/platanus.html) — Family: [Platanaceae](/trees/family/platanaceae.html)
- [*Populus nigra betulifolia* Black Poplar](/trees/species/black-poplar.html) — Genus: [Populus](/trees/genus/populus.html) — Family: [Salicaceae](/trees/family/salicaceae.html)
- [*Populus tremula* Aspen](/trees/species/aspen.html) — Genus: [Populus](/trees/genus/populus.html) — Family: [Salicaceae](/trees/family/salicaceae.html)
- [*Prunus avium* Sweet Cherry](/trees/species/sweet-cherry.html) — Genus: [Prunus](/trees/genus/prunus.html) — Family: [Rosaceae](/trees/family/rosaceae.html)
- [*Prunus cerasus* Sour Cherry](/trees/species/sour-cherry.html) — Genus: [Prunus](/trees/genus/prunus.html) — Family: [Rosaceae](/trees/family/rosaceae.html)
- [*Prunus dulcis* Almond](/trees/species/almond.html) — Genus: [Prunus](/trees/genus/prunus.html) — Family: [Rosaceae](/trees/family/rosaceae.html)
- [*Prunus padus* Bird Cherry](/trees/species/bird-cherry.html) — Genus: [Prunus](/trees/genus/prunus.html) — Family: [Rosaceae](/trees/family/rosaceae.html)
- [*Pyrus communis* Pear Beech Hill](/trees/species/pear-beech-hill.html) — Genus: [Pyrus](/trees/genus/pyrus.html) — Family: [Rosaceae](/trees/family/rosaceae.html)

## Q

- [*Quercus ilex* Holm Oak](/trees/species/holm-oak.html) — Genus: [Quercus](/trees/genus/quercus.html) — Family: [Fagaceae](/trees/family/fagaceae.html)
- [*Quercus robur* English Oak](/trees/species/english-oak.html) — Genus: [Quercus](/trees/genus/quercus.html) — Family: [Fagaceae](/trees/family/fagaceae.html)
- [*Quercus suber* Cork Oak](/trees/species/cork-oak.html) — Genus: [Quercus](/trees/genus/quercus.html) — Family: [Fagaceae](/trees/family/fagaceae.html)

## S

- [*Salix caprea* Goat Willow](/trees/species/goat-willow.html) — Genus: [Salix](/trees/genus/salix.html) — Family: [Salicaceae](/trees/family/salicaceae.html)
- [*Salix fragilis* Crack Willow](/trees/species/crack-willow.html) — Genus: [Salix](/trees/genus/salix.html) — Family: [Salicaceae](/trees/family/salicaceae.html)
- [*Sambucus nigra* Elder](/trees/species/elder.html) — Genus: [Sambucus](/trees/genus/sambucus.html) — Family: [Adoxaceae](/trees/family/adoxaceae.html)
